boundaryReason: Metric value, unit, and label have a normalization plan, but the evidence still needs a more concrete ratio and density adjustment proposal before CSS execution is allowed.

currentEvidence: Connected selector exists for MetricCard value.
Value remains the dominant compact metric role.
requiredBeforeCssExecution: Define whether the value size remains unchanged or receives a density-safe adjustment.
Confirm extreme value behavior in MetricCard and SummaryDashboard surfaces.

currentEvidence: Connected selector exists for MetricCard unit.
Visual QA flags unit and label as needing normalization review.
Unit may share primitive characteristics with label while keeping separate semantic role.
requiredBeforeCssExecution: Decide whether unit and label should share font family, weight, or line-height primitives.
Keep semantic token identity separate from any shared primitive decision.

currentEvidence: Connected selector exists for MetricCard label.
Visual QA flags long localized labels and extreme values as density risks.
Label must not collapse into the blocked metric caption role.
requiredBeforeCssExecution: Define label density behavior for long localized labels.
Decide whether label can share primitives with unit without merging semantic roles.

outOfScopeTokens.reason: Caption remains blocked from the metric normalization scope.
Duration remains selector-blocked and needs a separate selector strategy.
Date remains selector-blocked and needs a separate selector strategy.
Color groups still require contrast review and are outside this cycle.
Spacing groups still require transferability review and are outside this cycle.
State groups still require stronger state evidence and are outside this cycle.
Radius policy remains deferred and is outside this cycle.

nextRecommendedCycle.purpose: Define the exact metric value, unit, and label adjustment proposal before any CSS execution.

blockedActions: Do not change CSS in this cycle.
Do not change TSX in this cycle.
Do not change Storybook stories in this cycle.
Do not change semantic token values in this cycle.
Do not connect duration or date selectors in this cycle.
Do not promote typography tokens or the style system in this cycle.
